name: maritime_safety_model_based_triage_stonehaven_rig_utl
premise: A Maritime Safety response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving maritime safety model based triage stonehaven rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Kaito Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Kaito Ibrahim, accountable for a defensible call in Maritime Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Omar Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Omar Alvarez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Maritime Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Kaito Ibrahim must decide under rights vs utility. What does Kaito Ibrahim do?
